summary: Full-stack tested: 7/7 backend pytest passed; UI flows for Today/Subjects/Pomodoro/Schedule/Stats/Records/Settings all working; duration chips render in black (rgb(0,0,0)) per user requirement.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on first render but chart renders fine after layout settles

critical_code_review_comments: App.js is ~1380 lines; consider splitting per-view components into separate files for maintainability
Schedule alarms triggered only when ss==0 - if browser tab is throttled the second-aligned tick can be missed; consider matching by minute boundary with last-trigger guard
POST /api/import with empty subjects+sessions still proceeds; consider validating payload shape
seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_-prefixed subjects/sessions and cleaned up via teardown; one TEST_UI_Log subject + 15min session may remain from UI run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all CRUD + stats + export/import. Frontend public URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL works. Duration chip black-text requirement verified via getComputedStyle on data-testid=goal-chip and today-total-chip.
